home.heading: Welcome
home.description: This boilerplate gives you a production-ready Electron app with a strongly-typed IPC bridge, TanStack Query, Tailwind, i18n, and auto-updates.

playground.title: Map playground
playground.layersPanelHint: Click a trail to focus it on the map. Uncheck to hide.
playground.dropHintBody: Drop one or more GeoJSON files. LineStrings with elevation, names, and Trailfork metadata are fully supported.
playground.emptyTitle: Drop GeoJSON files or use Import GeoJSON to load trails.
playground.emptyBody: Click any trail to inspect elevation, length, tags, and Trailfork metadata.

demo.heading: Maps IPC demo
demo.description: Create a map in PGlite via IPC, list it back, and listen for main-process change events.
demo.empty: No maps yet. Create one above.

flow.mutate: Renderer: optimistic cache update (TanStack mutation onMutate)
flow.invoke: Renderer → preload → main: maps:create IPC invoke
flow.invalidate: Renderer: event listener invalidates maps:list query

list.heading: Maps
list.description: Open a map workspace or start a new georeferencing project.

delete.title: Delete map project?
delete.description: "{{name}}" and all of its files will be permanently removed.

create.heading: New map project
create.description: Upload a PDF or image, add details, and we will prepare your split workspace.
create.uploadDescription: Choose a PDF or image of the trail map you want to georeference.
create.detailsDescription: Add a name and optional location hints so we can find the right place on the base map.
create.processingDescription: Saving your file and opening the split map view.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Short notes about this map sheet
create.error: Could not create the map project.
create.cacheBoundsDescription: Click four corners on the map to outline the region whose tiles should be cached locally.
create.cacheBoundsDragHint: Drag any point to fine-tune the area.
create.cacheZoomHint: Lower zoom shows a wider area (more tiles). Zoom 11–13 helps when the map opens zoomed out; 16–17 is detail for alignment.
create.cacheBuildingDescription: This may take a minute. Tiles are saved on disk so the app and MCP can reuse them offline.

workspace.hardReloadHint: Reload the entire view if the map or document fails to load
workspace.controlsDescription: Update project details, map area, and PDF view settings.
workspace.projectSectionHint: Edit the name, description, or replace the source file.
workspace.mapSectionHint: Search for a location, switch base map style, or set coordinates.
workspace.pdfSectionHint: Drag the source to pan. Use the wheel to zoom. Adjust scale and rotation here.
workspace.replaceError: Could not replace the source file.
workspace.invalidCoordinates: Enter valid latitude and longitude values.
workspace.coordinatesIdle: Move over the map to preview coordinates.
workspace.tileCacheSectionHint: Cache base map tiles locally for offline use and MCP tools.
workspace.tileCacheError: Could not build the tile cache.
workspace.referenceHint: Ctrl+click the base map or paste coordinates, then Ctrl+click the PDF.

referenceGeoJson.title: Reference GeoJSON
referenceGeoJson.hint: Import trail or boundary GeoJSON for overlay on the base map. Files are stored under this app's user data folder for each map project.

workspace.referencePendingPdf: Map pin set at {{value}}. Ctrl+click the same spot on the PDF.
workspace.referenceError: Could not create the reference point.
workspace.focusReference: Show this reference on the PDF and map
workspace.traceHint: Ctrl+click to add vertices. Drag any vertex to adjust it. Drag the map to pan.
workspace.traceEditingHint: Editing saved trail. Drag vertices to adjust, Ctrl+click to add more, drag the map to pan.
workspace.tracePointCount: Finish when you have at least 2 points ({{count}} added).
workspace.trailsSectionHint: Saved LineStrings traced on the base map. Use Trace trail to add more, or edit a segment here.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.storageHint: This demo persists a value in the main-process storage backend via typed IPC.

backup.heading: Backups
backup.description: Full snapshots of your local database and map files (PDFs, thumbnails, reference layers). Restoring replaces live data; a safety backup is created automatically before each restore.
backup.locationsHint: Paths on this computer. Each backup is a timestamped folder under Backups.
backup.restored: Backup restored. Reload open map workspaces if anything looks stale.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore backup from {{date}}? Your current database and map files will be replaced. A safety backup will be created first.
backup.deleteConfirm: Delete backup from {{date}}? This cannot be undone.

mcp.heading: Local MCP server
mcp.description: Expose local PGlite tools over streamable HTTP on localhost. No authentication — only enable if you trust clients on this machine.

about.heading: About
about.body: Built with create-era-next — the modern successor to electron-react-boilerplate.
